babyDevelopment: Welcome to the Third Trimester! The baby's eyelashes are forming. The brain is becoming deeply grooved and convoluted as nerve cells multiply. The baby's kicks and movements are now much stronger and more frequent.
bodyChanges: You might feel more breathless as the uterus pushes against your diaphragm. Heartburn and indigestion may intensify. Your doctor will likely start seeing you every two weeks now. You may experience 'restless leg syndrome.'
tips: Start counting baby's kicks (aim for 10 movements in 2 hours)
Include more iron and Vitamin C to support blood volume

do: Sleep on your left side to maximize blood flow
Eat small snacks to manage heartburn
dont: Sleep on your back for extended periods
Ignore any signs of preterm labor (regular contractions)

travelAdvisory.note: Consult your doctor before long trips; focus on recovery time.

milestoneDescription: The home stretch! Baby is now about 1kg and growing fast.
